docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF REA, SONIA ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, EDUARDO ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
